commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=85de1ab264d5df5855517dc09674662f3a997e23)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds guarded payload field reads to OpenAI Responses web-search reasoning detection and regression tests for throwing payload tool accessors.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +74. Total +92 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: a direct OpenAI Responses payload tool with a throwing name accessor can pass the new stream-wrapper guard and still throw in extensions/openai/native-web-search.ts during the provider wrapper's native web-search filtering. I did not run tests because this review was read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This maintainer-labeled draft needs maintainer or author follow-up on the native-wrapper completeness finding before merge, not cleanup closure.

target.title: fix(providers): guard OpenAI web search tool detection
target.body:
## Summary

- guard OpenAI Responses web-search payload detection against throwing payload tool accessors
- keep detecting native, top-level function, and nested function `web_search` tool shapes
- add regression coverage for poisoned payload tool fields and nested fallback detection

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.ts src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: OpenAI Responses reasoning patching could throw while detecting `web_search` when a hook-mutated or plugin-derived payload tool exposed a throwing accessor.

Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree on `fuzz-tool-schema-next200-20260604`, rebased onto `origin/main` at `21031c2243f`, Node wrapper test harness.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/llm/providers/stream-wrappers/openai.test.ts`.

Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 1 file / 26 tests; oxlint, oxfmt, diff check, local autoreview, and branch autoreview all passed.

Observed result after fix: unreadable payload tool fields no longer abort web-search detection, healthy sibling `web_search` tools still raise minimal reasoning to low, and nested `function.name` detection still works when the top-level name accessor is unreadable.

What was not tested: broad `pnpm check:changed` did not run because Blacksmith Testbox was unauthenticated and Crabbox sparse-sync preflight failed before remote execution with less than 1 GiB free in the local Crabbox sparse-sync cache.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
